overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long AXP Daily ETF (AXPG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the American Express Company index. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) stock, less fees, and expenses. AXP is a mining company focused on the exploration and production of copper, gold, and molybdenum. AXPG was launched on Feb 19, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
